prompt: A timeline of money leaving my account soon: upcoming scheduled payments and subscription renewals, ordered by date with the total going out.
wire:
<App name="Upcoming Outflows">
  <Query id="scheduled" tool="host_listScheduledPayments" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="recurring" tool="host_getRecurringInsights" input={{}}/>
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <Text variant="heading" text="Money leaving soon"/>
    <Text variant="caption" text="Upcoming scheduled payments and subscription renewals, ordered by date"/>
  </Stack>
  <Island name="OutflowTimeline">export default function OutflowTimeline({ scheduled, recurring, scheduledTotal }) {
  const toItems = () => {
    const items = [];

    if (Array.isArray(scheduled)) {
      scheduled.forEach(p => {
        items.push({
          id: "s-" + (p.id || p.payee || p.date),
          label: p.payee || p.description || p.name || "Payment",
          amountCents: p.amountCents || p.amount || 0,
          date: p.date || p.scheduledDate || p.nextDate,
          type: "scheduled",
        });
      });
    }

    if (Array.isArray(recurring)) {
      recurring.forEach(r => {
        items.push({
          id: "r-" + (r.id || r.merchant || r.name),
          label: r.merchant || r.name || r.description || "Subscription",
          amountCents: r.amountCents || r.amount || 0,
          date: r.nextDate || r.nextBillingDate || r.date,
          type: "subscription",
        });
      });
    }

    items.sort((a, b) => {
      if (!a.date) return 1;
      if (!b.date) return -1;
      return new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime();
    });

    return items;
  };

  const items = toItems();

  const totalCents = items.reduce((sum, i) => sum + (i.amountCents || 0), 0);

  const formatMoney = (cents) => {
    if (!cents && cents !== 0) return "—";
    return "$" + (cents / 100).toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
  };

  const formatDate = (iso) => {
    if (!iso) return "—";
    const d = new Date(iso);
    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return "—";
    return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" });
  };

  const daysUntil = (iso) => {
    if (!iso) return null;
    const now = new Date("2026-07-21");
    const d = new Date(iso);
    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return null;
    const diff = Math.round((d.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    return diff;
  };

  const urgencyLabel = (days) => {
    if (days === null) return null;
    if (days < 0) return "Overdue";
    if (days === 0) return "Today";
    if (days === 1) return "Tomorrow";
    if (days <= 7) return `In ${days}d`;
    return null;
  };

  if (items.length === 0) {
    return (
      <Surface>
        <Stack gap={2}>
          <Text text="No upcoming payments found." variant="body"/>
        </Stack>
      </Surface>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Stack gap={3}>
      <Surface>
        <Row gap={4}>
          <Stack gap={1}>
            <Text text="Total going out" variant="caption"/>
            <Text text={formatMoney(totalCents)} variant="heading"/>
          </Stack>
          <Stack gap={1}>
            <Text text="Payments scheduled" variant="caption"/>
            <Text text={String(items.length)} variant="heading"/>
          </Stack>
        </Row>
      </Surface>

      <Stack gap={2}>
        {items.map((item) => {
          const days = daysUntil(item.date);
          const urgency = urgencyLabel(days);
          const isUrgent = days !== null && days <= 3;

          return (
            <Surface key={item.id}>
              <Row gap={3}>
                <Stack gap={1} style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                  <Row gap={2}>
                    <Text text={item.label} variant="body"/>
                    {urgency && (
                      <Badge
                        label={urgency}
                        tone={isUrgent ? "accent" : "neutral"}
                      />
                    )}
                    <Badge
                      label={item.type === "subscription" ? "Subscription" : "Scheduled"}
                      tone="neutral"
                    />
                  </Row>
                  <Text text={formatDate(item.date)} variant="caption"/>
                </Stack>
                <Text text={formatMoney(item.amountCents)} variant="body"/>
              </Row>
            </Surface>
          );
        })}
      </Stack>
    </Stack>
  );
}</Island>
</App>

props.text: Upcoming scheduled payments and subscription renewals, ordered by date
